title: GroundSlammer
description: A client-side Fabric mod that improves landings in Minecraft, featuring custom particles and sound effects.
body:
![A customized minecraft title with the mod's name "GroundSlammer" with mossy green colours.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/951861b0f270da6b8a57c00b2b18a0ec241fd003.png)

This is a **client-side Fabric mod** that adds **custom particles and sounds**, replacing or supplementing vanilla ones where applicable. During client ticks, the mod calculates entity movement and landing to decide **which particles and sounds to spawn**, creating dynamic and visually satisfying effects.

This mod is also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/groundslammer), any other links other than the ones I provide should be approached with *EXTREME CAUTION*.
  
#   Demo Showcase:
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZpHIedhPkCE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#   Little BTS (behind the scenes)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_--X4AmBn6E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Whether this mod fits your collection is up to you, but it adds extra visual and auditory flair to landings and interactions, making the world feel a bit more alive.

I plan to add customization options for behavior in the future, but for now the mod works as-is. If you want to inspect the code or verify its safety, the source is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/codex-bat/GroundSlammer).

Supports Minecraft 1.19.2 and 1.20.4. And I'm REALLY HAPPY TO ANNOUNCE, that as of a few days ago, the mod finally supports 1.21 and 1.21.11 (lucky them, they're being supported, unlike m- I'M JOKING. I'M JOKING).

If you have any questins or suggestions, hit me up on [Discord](https://codexbat.dev/discord)!

|| **Note:** This mod is open-source under **GPL-3.0-or-later**. Its use must comply with the license terms. ||
